items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A virtualized data table with row and column virtualization.

items.name: data-table-draggable-header
items.title: Data Table Draggable Header
items.description: Drag-to-reorder column header for the data table. Pairs with the column-reorder feature module.

items.name: data-table-draggable-group-header
items.title: Data Table Draggable Group Header
items.description: Drag-to-reorder column group header that moves an entire group of columns at once.
